question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/ParserProperties.java -> Scope: Medium: Incorrect or missing records exported to mirror nodes'] [Function: getBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that BatchProperties has no constraint preventing flushInterval from being set larger than the transactionTimeout, causing the batch to attempt to flush after the database transaction has already timed out, resulting in a TransactionTimedOutException that rolls back all records accumulated since the last successful flush?
